# Passing CS68 fixture

## Local target

See [the local target](#local-target) in step 2 for same-file navigation.

The standalone step 3 reference has no nearby markdown link.

External links are okay: see [example](https://example.com) step 4.

Inline code is okay: `[ops](OPERATIONS.md) step 5` should not warn.

See [operations](OPERATIONS.md) step 6 inside fenced code.
